home.newArrivalsSubtitle: Fresh from the studio to your wardrobe.
home.standardSubtitle: Six principles that define every thread, every seam, and every decision at DIDEE.

shop.title: THE SHOP
shop.subtitle: Discover every drop, every piece, every story.

collections.title: The DIDEE World
collections.subtitle: Each DIDEE collection is a distinct expression of Nepalese street culture — fearless drops that blend global aesthetics with Kathmandu's raw, unapologetic energy.

lookbook.title: LOOKBOOK
lookbook.subtitle: Each season, DIDEE curates a visual story that goes beyond fashion. Our lookbook is a window into the streets of Kathmandu — raw, unapologetic, and deeply human.

journal.title: THE JOURNAL
journal.subtitle: Stories from the streets of Kathmandu. Culture, craft, and the people behind every stitch.

about.title: About DIDEE
about.intro: DIDEE is a Nepalese fashion brand built on the belief that world-class design shouldn't require a world-class price tag.
about.body: We are built in Nepal, made for everyone. Every piece we create carries the spirit of Kathmandu — its raw energy, its fearless youth, and its unapologetic creativity.

chapters.heading: The Beginning
chapters.body: DIDEE was born from the streets of Kathmandu, inspired by the fearless youth culture that pulses through the city.

chapters.heading: The Vision
chapters.body: We believe fashion should be accessible, bold, and deeply rooted in identity. Not just aesthetics — but a statement.

chapters.heading: The Future
chapters.body: DIDEE is growing. New collections, new collaborations, new ways to express the Nepalese spirit to the world.

who-we-are.title: Who We Are
who-we-are.intro: DIDEE is a Nepalese fashion brand built on the belief that world-class design shouldn't require a world-class price tag — and that the most powerful style comes from the streets, not the runway.
who-we-are.founderBio: Raised in the streets of Kathmandu, Niraj founded DIDEE with one mission: to give Nepalese youth a fashion brand they could truly call their own.

our-services.title: Our Services
our-services.subtitle: From design to delivery, DIDEE offers a complete fashion ecosystem.

services.title: Custom Orders
services.description: Work directly with our team to create a piece that's uniquely yours.

services.title: Bulk & Wholesale
services.description: Partner with us for bulk orders, retail partnerships, and collaborative drops.

services.title: Styling Consultation
services.description: Book a session with a DIDEE stylist to curate your perfect look.

services.title: Brand Collaboration
services.description: Let's build something together. We're open to creative partnerships.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Reach out for orders, collabs, or just to say hello.
